reviewer: Claude (native-size review of .artifacts/visual/pico-cap/contact-sheet.png and frames/01-10 at 160x360)

characterCraft.note: The big hero reads as a capped knight: rust acorn cap with band and tip, skin/tunic/belt construction, facing flip, two-frame gait with boots, sword at the hip that sweeps a steel arc on slash and chop. The pico form keeps the cap and palette under a sky aura so the same character reads at 7px, and the morph swirl sells the transformation. Gnawers have outlined shells, sheen sweeps, three animated legs per side, mandibles, and gold eyes that go coral with wing-case rattle and kicked dust when hunting. Comparable per-actor craft to Machine Hunt's ~10px hunter and Block Mine's 12px miner at the same scale.

environmentCraft.note: With the HUD ignored the strip still reads as a built place: beveled hedge blocks with leaf clumps, berry bushes, mossy stones and blossoms; wet slate with seep threads; floorboards, table legs, book stacks and jam jars; carved moonstone with rune bands and teal crystals. Cracks are authored burrows/mouse-holes, mushroom rings are drawn props with pulse glow, brambles are thorn masses, the shrine is a pillared landmark, and light pools, canopy shade, fireflies and biome motes give lighting and motion.

levelVariety.note: Glade, creek, hearth, and moon rebuild the maze layout as well as the material language — the later/deep fixtures re-carve the glade, and the structure-distance gates measure real compositional change (0.15+ structure, 0.20+ edge magnitude), not palette swaps. Shell landmarks (trellis ivy, waterfalls, candle sconces, moon pillars) change the frame border per biome.

animationImpact.note: Walk and scuttle cycles are aligned-burst verified; hunts are measurably more agitated than roaming (median 0.067 vs 0.027). Payoffs have anticipation and follow-through: shrink/grow rings with capped radii, slash arc with POW and leaf burst, squish X with stars and a visible bounce (never a teleport), storm land flash with rolling scanlines, bloom rays across the shrine row, a charging channel beam, and a full-field gold restore celebration with confetti and a banner.

readability.note: At 160x360 beside video the dashed route ribbon, hero light pool, gold shard pools, and ring glows carry the eye; corridors sit darker than beveled walls; the HUD states quest, scent threat, shard pips, and BIG/PICO size; danger text flips color with proximity. Verified on the native frames, not only zoomed captures. Actor scale law is measured from drawn pixels: hero 20x21, pico 17x16, gnawer within 20x32, shrine 18 wide, combined footprint ~2.7% of the playfield, threats scented 6 tiles out with the whole field on screen.

artDirectionCohesion.note: One storybook-garden grammar holds across actors, biomes, props, HUD, and payoff banners: warm cream text panels, biome accent colors reused in plaques and glows, the same burst-ray and banner language from tier-1 cues to the GLADE RESTORED apex. The strip reads as one authored world, not a mechanics prototype.
